---
name: twn-quality-review
description: Perform evidence-based code, QA, security, accessibility, performance, and blueprint-compliance review.
---

# TWN Quality Review

Review one bounded change against its approved feature packet, acceptance
criteria, tests, browser evidence, and git diff.

Do not edit first. Report severity, confidence, evidence, impact, relevant
files, reproduction/verification, recommended investigation, and learning
concept.

Cover correctness, architecture, type safety, validation, permissions,
security, privacy, WCAG 2.2 AA, responsiveness, performance, SEO, failure
states, test quality, maintainability, and operational impact.
